proposal1.heroHeadline: Kids Industries is burning 1,000 hours a year on manual proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually crafting proposals bleeds time. Automated generation delivers in 47 seconds, tailored for family-focused brands.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every minute spent on proposals drains resources from strategic initiatives.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Drafts
problems.description: Each proposal takes hours to craft, pulling your team away from creative work. This results in a significant loss of strategic output.

problems.title: Delayed Client Engagement
problems.description: Proposal delays cost you immediate client interactions, slowing down the sales cycle. This could mean thousands in lost revenue opportunities.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually creating each proposal risks inconsistent brand messaging. This inconsistency weakens brand perception, costing potential deals.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled employees to draft proposals increases operational costs. These resources could be better allocated to client strategy.

problems.title: Lost Competitive Edge
problems.description: Slow proposals cost competitive advantage in a fast-paced market. This results in missed opportunities and decreased market share.

problems.title: Reduced Innovation Time
problems.description: Time spent on proposals limits time for innovation and strategy. This reduces your ability to stay ahead in the family market.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system is the answer to these costly inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals are manually drafted over hours. Our system delivers complete proposals in under 60 seconds, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes risk brand inconsistency. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand's voice and strategy.

solutions.title: Cost-Effective Operations
solutions.description: High labor costs are tied up in proposal drafting. Our system reallocates those resources to more strategic areas of your business.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Engagement
solutions.description: Delayed proposals slow client interaction. With our system, engage clients almost instantly with tailored, ready-to-go proposals.

solutions.title: Increased Innovation Time
solutions.description: Time-consuming proposals limit innovation. Our system gives your team more time to focus on creative strategies and market leadership.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Kids Industries's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Kids Industries around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Kids Industries.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock the Potential of Acme Corp with Family-Centric Strategies.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a comprehensive plan to connect Acme Corp's brand with families, driving growth and loyalty.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every missed connection with families is a lost opportunity for Acme Corp.

problems.title: Low Family Engagement
problems.description: Acme Corp's current family engagement is below industry average, costing potential long-term customer relationships.

problems.title: Brand Recognition
problems.description: Without a strong family-centric brand, Acme Corp is losing out on market share to competitors who resonate better with this demographic.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing
problems.description: Acme Corp spends heavily on marketing, yet the return on investment is not maximized, resulting in wasted resources.

problems.title: Customer Loyalty
problems.description: A significant percentage of one-time buyers do not convert into repeat customers, impacting Acme Corp's revenue stability.

problems.title: Digital Presence
problems.description: Acme Corp's website traffic is high, but conversion rates are low, indicating a disconnect with potential customers.

problems.title: Product Positioning
problems.description: Current product positioning does not appeal sufficiently to family-oriented buyers, leading to missed sales.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these challenges to transform Acme Corp's business.

solutions.title: Creative Strategy
solutions.description: We will craft compelling stories that connect Acme Corp's brand with families, creating an emotional bond.

solutions.title: Market Research
solutions.description: Our in-depth research will uncover insights into family buying behaviors, allowing us to tailor Acme Corp's offerings.

solutions.title: Digital Optimization
solutions.description: Enhancing Acme Corp's digital platforms to improve user experience and increase conversion rates.

solutions.title: Brand Strategy
solutions.description: We will reposition Acme Corp's brand to be more appealing to families, boosting recognition and loyalty.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: At Kids Industries, we specialize in making brands family-friendly.

whyUsCards.title: Award-Winning
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies have been recognized globally, ensuring Acme Corp partners with the best.

whyUsCards.title: Family Focused
whyUsCards.description: We understand families, allowing us to create meaningful connections with your brand.

whyUsCards.title: Global Reach
whyUsCards.description: Our international experience will help Acme Corp expand its family appeal globally.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Our history of success speaks for itself, making us a trusted partner for Acme Corp.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to transforming Acme Corp.

team.name: Gary Pope
team.bio: Gary leads our strategy and client relationships, ensuring the success of every partnership.

lead.company_description:
We make family targeted brands stronger by delivering award winning insight, strategy and content. We work across multiple disciplines and in multiple industries. We've got researchers, marketers, designers, strategists, geeks and psychologists. We've built new websites, award winning hotels for the family, developed new TV stations, created new cereals, launched new products and researched just about everything under the sun.

Unique? We think so. There is no other company in the world that offers our level of family understanding coupled with the ability to turn this into effective strategy and implementation.

We'd love to hear from you at hello@kidsindustries.com or give us a ring on 0203 432 8574
lead.headline: Co-founder, Kids Industries | License Global's Influencer Of 2022 | Children's Ambassador Poc | Family Market Expert | Everything I Post Is By Me. Always.
